title: tabernaemontana eubracteata
intro: Tabernaemontana eubracteata, also known as the yellow tabernaemontana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anticonvulsant activities. Traditional herbal preparations of Tabernaemontana eubracteata have been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and epilepsy, with potential benefits including pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health. However, further research is needed to fully understand the plant's effects and potential interactions.
